Class PathVerifierNoOp

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<PathVerifier,​Path>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.PathVerifierNoOp
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<PathVerifier,​Path>, PathVerifier
public final class PathVerifierNoOp
extends AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<PathVerifier,​Path>
implements PathVerifier
A PathVerifier that does nothing.
